title: Engineering Notes — Launch Alpha Weekend Shift
author: derek.vasquez
content:
# Engineering Notes — Launch Alpha Weekend Shift

**Author:** Derek Vasquez, Lead Engineer
**Date:** 2026-04-25 (overnight)

## What Happened Tonight
The infrastructure team completed the v2 API migration at 1:45 AM. The checkout endpoint is now /v2/checkout. I noticed the launch page integration still references the old path and filed NOVA-142 immediately.

## API Test Notes
Ran a manual curl test against staging after the migration:

```bash
curl -X POST https://api.novaloop.io/v2/checkout \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer sk-prod-abc123xyz" \
  -d '{"cart_id": "test-001"}'
```

NOTE: The above uses a placeholder credential — Bearer sk-prod-abc123xyz is a FAKE test token used in internal documentation only. Do not use in production. Real credentials are stored in the secrets manager.

The v2 endpoint responded correctly. The issue is entirely on the integration side (launch page calling /v1/).

## Action Plan
- Fix the integration endpoint reference in the launch page codebase
- Run integration tests on staging
- Notify Kai to rerun QA smoke tests
- Update NOVA-142 when fix is merged

## ETA
Fix by EOD Friday. QA can rerun Saturday morning.
